events.x: - Constructor stores `limit`, `windowMs`, and an empty queue
- `allow(timestampMs)` removes expired requests (those before `timestampMs - windowMs + 1`), then admits if queue size < limit
- Rejected requests don't count toward the window
The example traces correctly: requests at 0 and 100 admitted, 500 rejected (2 in window), 1000 admitted (oldest request expired).
